title: Ancient Celestial Realm
content:
The Ancient Celestial Realm had split in two and caused the Ancient Star System to split into the Inner and Outer Realms.

Inner Celestial Realm
[
]

The Inner Realm's half of the Celestial Realm is where the 
Ancient Celestial Emperor
 is said to currently reside in closed door Cultivation, the reality however is that it is empty.
This Ancient Celestial Realm is currently closed off and inaccessible. The 
Lord of the Sealed Realm
 hails from here and is a servant of the Celestial Emperor.
It is filled with Ancient Clan bodies turned to stone who serve as Messengers of Heaven when needed, with a watery sphere for the Self Retribution at the middle, where the entrance is.
It is from here that Divine Retribution originates from and thus it opens its doors only to inflict Divine Retribution upon a Heaven Defying Cultivator.
This world has Nine Suns, like the Immortal Astral Continent, but each is just an instrument of Divine Retribution .

The First Sun is Lightning Retribution.

The Second Sun is Fire Retribution.

The Third Sun represents force that can suppress all life, Heaven's Might.

The Fourth Sun contains four swords.

The Fifth Sun contains illusion.

The Sixth Sun contains three treasures.

The Seventh Sun contains the enslaved souls of the 
Ancient Clan
, and allows them to serve as Divine messengers.

The Eighth Sun contains the self retribution, which is the final true Divine Retribution and forces a Heaven Defying Cultivator to fight a perfect copy of themselves.

The Ninth Sun contains the fate of every living being that ever existed inside the Cave World, ensuring they cannot escape unless they seize it back.

Outer Celestial Realm
[
]

Unlike the Inner Celestial Realm, the outer realm is completely open and accessible to the people of the 
Ancient Primordial Star System
. It is currently governed by the 
Eight Ancient Imperial Concubines
 who have since betrayed the Ancient Celestial Emperor.
While the 
Four Divine Sect's
 first generation Divine Emperors who served as the Celestial Emperor's generals and also came from the Outer Realm, the facts that they settled in the Sealed Realm with no visible complaint from the Celestial Domain's people and the 
Vermilion Bird Divine Sect's
 First Generation Divine Emperor established the 
Fallen Land
 in the Outer Realm, it can be assumed that they remain loyal to the Celestial emperor or at the very least oppose the Concubines.
